name: Kosmos Energy
description: Deepwater oil and gas explorer focused entirely on West Africa and the Atlantic margins.

name: Vaalco Energy
description: Independent oil producer operating mature fields across Sub-Saharan Africa and North Africa.

name: Karoon Energy
description: Australian oil producer with its primary producing asset in the Santos Basin offshore Brazil.

name: Amtech Systems
description: Makes thermal processing and wafer handling equipment sold to chip fabs worldwide.

name: Photronics
description: Manufactures photomasks — the master templates used to print circuit patterns onto semiconductor wafers.

name: Cohu
description: Supplies semiconductor test and handling equipment primarily to back-end assembly and test facilities in Southeast Asia.

name: Euroseas
description: Greek owner-operator of containerships serving feeder routes between major and regional ports.

name: Pangaea Logistics Solutions
description: Specialises in ice-class bulk carrier voyages to Arctic and other challenging ports year-round.

name: Himalaya Shipping
description: Newbuild Kamsarmax dry bulk fleet focused on coal and grain trades exposed to commodity and sanctions flows.

name: Limoneira Company
description: Grows and markets lemons and avocados from California and Chile, with revenues tied to global citrus trade lanes.

name: Adecoagro
description: South American agri-industrial company producing sugar, ethanol, rice, and dairy across the Southern Cone.

name: Kaveri Seed Company
description: Indian hybrid seed developer supplying cotton, corn, and vegetable seeds across South and Southeast Asia.

name: HEICO Corporation (Electronic Technologies Group)
description: Makes FAA-approved replacement parts for commercial and military aircraft at a fraction of OEM prices.

name: Chemring Group
description: UK-listed manufacturer of countermeasures, energetic materials, and electronic warfare systems for NATO militaries.

name: Aerojet Rocketdyne (L3Harris spin-out assets) — Kratos Defense
description: Builds unmanned aerial systems, rocket propulsion, and satellite ground systems for US and allied defence programmes.

name: Tingyi (Cayman Islands) Holding
description: Dominant maker of instant noodles and beverages in China with wheat and palm oil supply chains exposed to war-related disruptions.

name: Bim Birlesik Magazalar
description: Turkey's largest hard-discount grocery chain with operations in North Africa, highly exposed to Turkish lira volatility.

name: Lotte Chilsung Beverage
description: South Korean producer of carbonated drinks, juice, and alcoholic beverages with growing Southeast Asia distribution.

name: Transportadora de Gas del Sur (TGS)
description: Operates Argentina's largest natural gas pipeline network and is a key node in Southern Cone energy security.

name: Siltronic AG
description: German manufacturer of hyperpure silicon wafers — the foundational substrate for virtually all semiconductor chips.
